name: Beehiiv
description: Beehiiv is a newsletter platform built for growth. Use it to manage subscribers, create and publish posts, segment your audience, track analytics, and run referral programs. It supports bulk operations and automation journeys.

capabilities.name: manage_subscriptions
capabilities.description: Create, list, update, or delete subscribers in your publication. Supports bulk operations and filtering by email or ID.

capabilities.name: create_post
capabilities.description: Create and publish a new newsletter post to your audience with HTML content, subject line, and scheduling options.

capabilities.name: list_posts
capabilities.description: Retrieve your published and draft posts along with their performance metrics like opens, clicks, and deliveries.

capabilities.name: manage_segments
capabilities.description: List and inspect audience segments. Retrieve the subscribers belonging to a segment, and recalculate segment membership.

capabilities.name: get_post_analytics
capabilities.description: Retrieve aggregate analytics across all posts or for a specific post, including open rates, click rates, and subscriber growth.

capabilities.name: manage_custom_fields
capabilities.description: Create, update, list, and delete custom data fields on subscriber profiles for richer segmentation and personalization.
